message:
test(core): add serde roundtrip and default-value tests for all model structs

Add 260 lines of unit tests covering serialization fidelity for every
model struct: Project, Product, ProductProjectLink, Agent, Message,
MessageRecipient, FileReservation, AgentLink, ConsistencyReport, and
ConsistencyMessageRef. Also adds default-value tests, edge cases for
sanitize_agent_name (long input, special chars only), None thread_id
serialization, and a valid_name_count assertion (62 adj x 69 nouns =
4,278 combinations).

Tagged as bead br-3h13.1.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
